name: bootstrap-meta-missing
description: Host's `ui/initialize` response returns a tool-output without `_meta.ggui.bootstrap` (or missing the `runtimeUrl` field). Thin shell emits `postMessage({type:'ggui:bootstrap-failed', reason:'BOOTSTRAP_META_MISSING', message})` to the parent. No WS connection opens — live-channel envelopes are out of scope pre-handshake.
